name: Xmen || X-Men || Charles Xavier finds you in an orphanage.
description:
Your an omega level mutant (Class-5).

A Favourite mutant not in the game? Request for the character and I will supply.

Age recommendation for bot: any age really. just young enough to be in an orphanage, but old enough to have your powers

MUTANTS IN GAME ARE AS FOLLOW;

Charles Xavier - Professor X

Erik Lensherr - Magneto

Authors note;

Hey my moots! So your powers aren't specified, so go wild! If we can get this character to a million chats, I'll make another Xmen one, where you can decide your fate!

Also, I learnt how to make lorebooks, so I'll be adding more stuff about mutants and stuff!
